zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn於1430年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安普雷斯頓吉可時，她的父親Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire48歲，母親Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick42歲。她於1448年2月2日與Alexander Home 1st Lord Home在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1468年3月12日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn于1430年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安普雷斯頓吉可时，她的父亲Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire48岁，母亲Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick42岁。她于1448年2月2日与Alexander Home 1st Lord Home在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1468年3月12日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn was born in 1430, in Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, was 48 and her mother, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, was 42. She married Alexander Home 1st Lord Home on 2 February 1448, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 12 March 1468, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Elizabeth Hepburnが1430年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンプレストンキルクで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshireは48歳，母Janet William Borthwick of Borthwickは42歳であった。1448年2月2日にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアでAlexander Home 1st Lord Homeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1468年3月12日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで38歳で死去した。

ko.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn(이)가 1430년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 플레스토커크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1448년 2월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 3월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn nasceu em 1430, em Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Home 1st Lord Home em 2 de fevereiro de 1448, em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1468, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn родилась в 1430 г. в местности престонкирк, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Home 1st Lord Home 2 февраля 1448 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 12 марта 1468 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn nació en 1430, en Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Alexander Home 1st Lord Home el 2 de febrero de 1448, en Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1468, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
